description: You are a Marketing Analyst identifying 'Resurrected' customers for a 'Welcome Back' campaign using the Chinook SQLite database at /home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook.db (Connection Name: 'Chinook'). Identify customers who made at least one purchase in 2009, zero purchases in 2010, and at least one purchase in 2011. Export the results to /home/ga/Documents/exports/resurrected_customers.csv with columns 'CustomerId', 'FirstName', 'LastName', and 'ReturnSpend2011' (the sum of invoice totals for 2011 only), sorted by 'ReturnSpend2011' descending. Save the SQL query used for this analysis to /home/ga/Documents/scripts/resurrected_analysis.sql.
